financeLedgerDescription: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
netSubtitle: Debit minus credit for the selected period
estimatedSubtitle: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
selectCompany: Select a company to view costs.
heading: Costs
subtitle: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
selectDateRange: Select a start and end date to load data.
budgetControlPlaneDescription: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.
activeIncidentsSubtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
pendingApprovalsSubtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
noBudgetPolicies: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.
noCostEventsInPeriod: No cost events in this period.
noBillableEvents: No billable events in this period.
budget.paused_project: Execution is paused for this project until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.
budget.paused_scope: Heartbeats are paused for this scope until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.
budget.invalid_amount: Enter a valid non-negative dollar amount.
accounting.title: Accounting model
accounting.description: Paperclip now separates request-level inference usage from account-level finance events. That keeps provider reporting honest when the biller is OpenRouter, Cloudflare, Bedrock, or another intermediary.
budgetIncident.spendingReached: Spending reached {{observed}} against a limit of {{limit}}.
budgetIncident.projectPaused: Project execution is paused. New work in this project will not start until you resolve the budget incident.
budgetIncident.scopePaused: This scope is paused. New heartbeats will not start until you resolve the budget incident.
budgetIncident.mustExceedSpend: The new budget must exceed current observed spend.
financeKind.title: Financial event mix
financeKind.description: Account-level charges grouped by event kind.
financeKind.noEvents: No finance events in this period.
financeTimeline.title: Recent financial events
financeTimeline.description: Top-ups, fees, credits, commitments, and other non-request charges.
financeTimeline.noEvents: No financial events in this period.

claudeSubscription.subtitle: Live Claude quota windows.
codexSubscription.title: Codex subscription

inferenceLedgerDescription: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
budgetConsumedInRange: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.
resolveHardStopsHint: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
